ansible.mcp.run_tool.short_description: Call a specific tool on an MCP server
ansible.mcp.run_tool.description: Call a specific tool on an MCP server. The plugin validates tool calls using the server

ansible.mcp.server_info.description: This module retrieves server information from an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. The server information is returned from the initialization step of the MCP connection. This module requires the MCP connection plugin to be configured.

ansible.mcp.tools_info.short_description: Retrieve a list of supported tools from an MCP server
ansible.mcp.tools_info.description: This module is used to discover available tools from an MCP server. The module sends a tools/list request to the server.
